reviews.comment:
Los salames piamonteses secos y en grasa.estos últimos manjar total.superiores a los de la colonia.muy buenos precios y atención.ademas buenos quesos y cvza.no perdérselo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Dry and fat-cured Piedmontese salamis. The latter are a true delicacy, superior to those from the colony. Very good prices and service. Also, good cheeses and beer. Don't miss it!!!

reviews.comment:
Para quienes viajamos a Córdoba por las sierras desde hace años es el lugar ideal para reponer energías y repostar combustible con una ponderable higiene y atención,proverbiales en el ACA

(Translated by Google)
For those of us who have been traveling to Córdoba through the mountains for years, it is the ideal place to recharge and refuel with commendable hygiene and service, proverbial at the ACA.
